title: Campfire Math
subject: Mathematics
description: Learn multiplication, subtraction, and word problems using real survival logic.

questions.question: Each camper needs 3 liters of water per day. If there are 4 campers, how many liters of water do they need in total for one day?
A box of matches contains 50 matches. If we use 3 matches to light a fire every day, how many matches do we use in one week (7 days)?
Our solar battery starts at 100% capacity. During the night, the lights consume 35% and the radio consumes 15%. What percentage is left in the morning?
